What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: Individuals walk along a dirt path carrying wooden frames and farming tools like hoes, while a group of men sit on the ground surrounded by large piles of brown cocoa pods and metal bowls containing white beans. Workers wear t-shirts in colors like yellow, blue, and beige with some garments showing holes or printed text, and a CNN logo watermark remains visible in the bottom right corner.
